sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13499" key="a)po/prisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-πρῑσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n13499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sawing off,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.77</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
